subcodes.first_line: O thou beloved scion of him that hath been immersed in the ocean of divine forgiveness! A long time hath passed since I last wrote
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سلیل عزیز آن مستغرق دریای مغفرت الهی مدتیست مدیده تحریری نشد و تقریری نگشت
subcodes.subjects: @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
